mapper.sql: select r.room_id, r.campus, r.room_number, r.room_name, r.capacity, r.equipment, r.status, r.is_abnormal, r.damaged_equipment, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, EXISTS ( select 1 from mms_meeting m where m.room_id = r.room_id and m.del_flag = '0' and m.status = '0' and now() between m.start_time and m.end_time ) AS occupied from mms_room r
mapper.select: select m.meeting_id AS "meetingId", m.title AS "title", m.category AS "category", m.host_name AS "hostName", m.start_time AS "startTime", m.end_time AS "endTime", m.status AS "status" from mms_meeting m where m.room_id = #{roomId} and m.del_flag = '0' order by m.start_time desc limit 20
mapper.update: update mms_room set is_abnormal = #{isAbnormal}, damaged_equipment = #{damagedEquipment}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.insert: insert into mms_room_inspection (room_id, meeting_id, inspect_type, damaged_equip, note, result, create_by, create_time) values (#{roomId}, #{meetingId}, #{inspectType}, #{damagedEquip}, #{note}, #{result}, #{createBy}, now())
